solution.p: To use the quadratic formula, we identify a=7.6\text{,} b=-12.2\text{,} and c=4.4\text{.}

The solution set is approximately {\left\{0.547151,1.05811\right\}}\text{.} Note that since we started with decimal coefficients, we felt it was acceptible to round the solutions to decimal approximations rather than keep to the exact solutions.
